rows.description: Receiv'd arrears of Wm Thurs Benefaction in full for ye year 1750.
rows.notes: Amounts confirmed by consensus. The description combines two lines from the original text; gpt-5-mini correctly parsed this as a single logical entry, while gemini-flash split it into two. Visually verified 'Wm Thurs' (gemini-flash) over 'Mr Thiers' (gpt-5-mini), and confirmed 'Receiv'd' with an apostrophe. This required visual verification for the full and accurate description.
rows.english_description: Arrears of William Thurs's benefaction paid in full for the year 1750.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Arrears of William Thurs's benefaction for the year 1750, amounting to £70 0s 0d.

rows.description: Receiv'd of Dr Coperat a Ballance of Some Cautions & Battley
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts and half-penny fraction. gpt-5-mini correctly combined the two lines of description into a single logical entry, for which gemini-flash created two separate rows. The final description combines elements from both: 'Receiv'd' (apostrophe confirmed visually), 'Coperat' (from gemini-flash, appears more accurate than gpt-5-mini's 'Copart'), and 'Battley' (from gpt-5-mini, more accurate than gemini-flash's 'Batly'). gpt-5-mini's notes acknowledged ambiguity in the description, which guided this careful combination.
rows.english_description: Balance received from Dr Coperat comprising some caution-money (deposits) and battels (student charges).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Balance received from Dr Coperat for certain cautions and battels, amounting to £8 1s 6½d.

rows.description: Receiv'd of Mr Upton fees for Degrees fro June 30th 1751 to June 30th 1752.
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. gpt-5-mini correctly combined the two lines of description into a single logical entry. Visually verified 'fro' (gemini-flash) over 'per' (gpt-5-mini), and confirmed '30th' for both dates (gpt-5-mini missed 'th' on the second date). Confirmed 'Receiv'd' with an apostrophe. gpt-5-mini's approach to merging the description lines was favored over gemini-flash's splitting.
rows.english_description: Degree fees paid by Mr Upton covering 30 June 1751 to 30 June 1752.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Degree fees received from Mr Upton for 30 June 1751 to 30 June 1752, amounting to £12 15s 10d.

rows.notes: Full consensus between extractors for all values. This is an intermediate subtotal, clearly indicated by the horizontal line and values.

Consensus on monetary values and fraction. The description 'Summa Receptorum' (gpt-5-mini) is preferred as it is a common Latin phrase, over 'Summa Receptorium' (gemini-flash), and the numerical values were removed from gpt-5-mini's description as they are redundantly captured in the amount fields. gpt-5-mini's notes provided more detail on the reading of the farthing symbol.
Full consensus between extractors. Clearly a header for the next section. Visually confirmed the trailing period identified by gpt-5-mini.
This row, representing the currency column headers, was correctly identified by gpt-5-mini but completely missed by gemini-flash. Visually confirmed its presence and role as a header.

Disagreement on shillings (15 vs 16) and description ('Curitate' vs 'Custode'). Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's 'Curitate Oxon' and '15' shillings are correct. gpt-5-mini's transcription for this row was significantly incorrect.
rows.english_description: Payment to the curate at Oxford.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to the curate at Oxford, amounting to £3 15s 8d.

rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. The description shows a minor difference ('adij' vs 'adj:'). Visually, 'adij' (gemini-flash) appears more accurate due to the joined 'ij' ligature. gpt-5-mini's note acknowledging ambiguity was helpful.
rows.english_description: Payment to Christ Church (abbreviated Coll: adij Christi).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Christ Church, amounting to £0 0s 4d.

rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Similar to the previous entry, 'adij' (gemini-flash) is visually more accurate than 'adji' (gpt-5-mini). gemini-flash's note highlighting the distinctness of this entry from the prior one due to different amounts is a good observation.
rows.english_description: Payment to Christ Church (abbreviated Coll: adij Christi).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Christ Church, amounting to £0 18s 0d.

rows.notes: Full consensus between extractors for description and amounts. gpt-5-mini's note about stylised Latin abbreviations is a good observation.
rows.english_description: Payment to All Souls College (College of All Souls).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to All Souls College, amounting to £4 12s 4d.

rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Minor difference in punctuation for description: 'Coll: Bal:' (gemini-flash) vs 'Coll. Bal:' (gpt-5-mini). Visually, a colon is present after 'Coll', making gemini-flash's reading more accurate.
rows.english_description: Payment to Balliol College (abbreviated Coll: Bal.).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Balliol College, amounting to £0 12s 6d.

rows.notes: Full consensus between extractors for description and amounts. gpt-5-mini's note about the cramped and slightly uncertain abbreviation is a good piece of reasoning.
rows.english_description: Payment to St John's College (College of St John Baptist).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to St John's College, amounting to £0 8s 2d.

rows.notes: Full consensus between extractors for description and amounts. gpt-5-mini's note acknowledging slight ambiguity in 'Capons' (e.g., 'Copes') is a helpful observation.
rows.english_description: Payment for the mayor's capons.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment for the mayor's capons, amounting to £0 14s 0d.

rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. Description 'Curæ Horting' is a combination: gpt-5-mini correctly identified the 'æ' ligature in 'Curæ', while gemini-flash more accurately read 'Horting' over gpt-5-mini's 'Hunting'. gpt-5-mini's note acknowledged small, connected letters and context.
rows.english_description: Payment relating to the cure/curacy of Horting (parish curacy expense).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment for the cure/curacy of Horting, amounting to £0 1s 8d.

rows.notes: Consensus on amounts and fraction. For the description, gemini-flash's 'Procurationi Kidl:' is visually more accurate with the trailing 'i' than gpt-5-mini's 'Procuration Kild:'. gpt-5-mini's note regarding abbreviations and unclear portions is valid but gemini-flash provided a better transcription.
rows.english_description: Procuration payments for the parishes of Kidlington, South Newington, and Merton.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Procuration payments for Kidlington, South Newington, and Merton, amounting to £1 18s 11¼d.

rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. For description, gemini-flash's 'Synodals' is visually more accurate than gpt-5-mini's 'Syndals', and also correctly included the trailing period. gpt-5-mini's note mentioned the abbreviation but still misread 'Synodals'.
rows.english_description: Synodal dues for the same parishes as above, covering 1751 and 1752.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Synodal dues for the same parishes (for 1751 and 1752), amounting to £0 14s 0d.

rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. For description, gemini-flash's 'Janitori' is visually more accurate with the trailing 'i' than gpt-5-mini's 'Janitor'.
rows.english_description: Wages paid to the janitor.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Wages paid to the janitor, amounting to £1 14s 8d.

rows.notes: Full consensus between extractors for description and amounts. gpt-5-mini's note acknowledged potential ambiguity with 'Coxon', but 'Coquo' is the visually stronger reading.
rows.english_description: Wages paid to the cook.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Wages paid to the cook, amounting to £1 10s 4d.

rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. For description, gemini-flash's 'Lotrici' is visually accurate. gpt-5-mini's 'Cotrice' is a misreading, though its note did acknowledge the uncertainty in transcription.
rows.english_description: Wages paid to the laundress/washer (lotrici).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Wages paid to the laundress, amounting to £2 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Significant disagreement. gpt-5-mini completely misread the description as 'Latrie' and the shillings as '6'. Visual verification clearly confirms gemini-flash's 'Feull: & Quadrang:' and '5' shillings. gemini-flash's note about the compact '5' is also accurate.
rows.english_description: Payment relating to the quadrangle (works or charges for the quadrangle).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment for the quadrangle (and associated charges), amounting to £1 5s 8d.

rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. gpt-5-mini incorrectly read the description as 'Seull. & Quadrans:', possibly confusing it with the previous entry or hallucinating parts. Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's 'Carbonibus' is correct.
rows.english_description: Purchase of coals (carbonibus).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment for coals, amounting to £46 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. gpt-5-mini incorrectly read the description as 'Cartonibus'. Visual verification clearly confirms gemini-flash's 'Cleaning Chapel Octr 5th' is correct, despite gpt-5-mini's note about faintness.
rows.english_description: Payment for cleaning the chapel on October 5th.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment for cleaning the chapel on October 5th, amounting to £0 2s 0d.

rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. gpt-5-mini incorrectly assigned the description 'Cleaning Chapel Octr 5th' to this row (which belongs to the previous row). Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's 'Fonsori' is the correct description for these amounts.
rows.english_description: Payment to the barber (tonsor/tonsori).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to the barber, amounting to £0 13s 4d.

rows.notes: Consensus on amounts. gpt-5-mini completely misread the description as 'Gorson' and then hallucinated an additional, empty 'supervision' row below it that does not exist in the image. Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's 'Supervisori' is correct.
rows.english_description: Payment to the supervisor.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to the supervisor, amounting to £4 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Full consensus between extractors for all values. Clearly the final total row for the 'Soluta ordinaria' section.
